summary: First-finish smoke test of Narrative.Rx dental claim assistant. Backend: /api/procedures returns 22 procedures with radiograph metadata; /api/generate with D2740 returns short+long narratives (252/693 chars) + radiographs and persists to history; invalid code returns 400; history list, get-by-id, delete, and 404-after-delete all pass. Frontend: dashboard loads, procedure select+grouping works, radiograph advisor updates before generation, generate flow renders both narratives with word counts, history page shows saved item, search works, dialog opens with dlg-copy buttons, delete removes item, and reset restores empty state.
passed: POST /api/generate D2740 -> 200 with id, short_narrative, long_narrative, radiographs, persisted
Dashboard: procedure-select populates and D2740 selectable
Radiograph panel shows Required PA (pre-op), Recommended BW/PA (post-prep), and carrier note before generation
Generate flow renders short and long narrative panels with word counts (~10s LLM latency)
History page shows generated item; search filter works; dialog opens with dlg-copy-short/long; delete removes item
Reset (Clear) button restores empty-state on dashboard
action_items: Minor (non-blocking): sonner toast element was not detectable via generic [data-sonner-toast]/.toast selectors after copy-short click. Copy button itself works. Consider adding a data-testid on the toast if you want reliable QA, but functionality is fine.
Minor (a11y warning, non-blocking): React console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' on history dialog. Add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to silence.
